# cloudtemple_vpc_floating_ips (Data Source)

Used to retrieve all VPC floating IPs. Can be filtered by VPC ID.

To query this datasource you will need the `vpc_read` role.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Read all floating IPs
data "cloudtemple_vpc_floating_ips" "all" {}

# Read the floating IPs bound to a static IP in a specific VPC
data "cloudtemple_vpc_floating_ips" "by_vpc" {
  vpc_id = "39ea5bbe-50ff-49b1-82b7-a6857b9aea4c"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `vpc_id` (String) Filter floating IPs that have a static IP in the given VPC. If not provided, returns all floating IPs for the tenant.

### Read-Only

- `floating_ips` (List of Object) The list of floating IPs matching the filter. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--floating_ips))
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--floating_ips"></a>
### Nested Schema for `floating_ips`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `ip_address` (String)
- `private_network_id` (String)
- `static_ip_address` (String)
- `static_ip_id` (String)
- `vpc_id` (String)
